# Stratos-X Technologies LLC

> Stratos-X Technologies LLC is an independent software company that builds focused, high-quality software products and maintains trusted relationships with affiliated partners. The company is committed to creating tools that solve real-world problems with clarity, reliability, and practical results.

## About

Stratos-X Technologies LLC is an independent software company based in the United States. It develops two primary software products — Sophie CRM and Emergency Ready — and maintains affiliated partnerships with Ramoutar Jewellers and Happily-Club. The company's philosophy is that great software should be focused, reliable, and easy to use.

Contact: stratosxtech@gmail.com
Website: https://www.stratosxtech.com

## Products

- [Sophie CRM](https://www.sophiecrm.com): An AI-powered customer relationship management tool built for modern sales teams. Sophie CRM focuses on better email outreach, contact management, and focused sales execution. It delivers 3× more replies and is used by sales professionals who need a reliable, distraction-free CRM.

- [Emergency Ready](https://www.emergency-global.com): A personal preparedness companion for weather alerts, safety resources, and family emergency planning. Used in 80+ countries, Emergency Ready helps individuals and families stay prepared for emergencies with real-time alerts and structured safety planning tools.

## Affiliated Partners

- [Ramoutar Jewellers](https://ramoutarjewellers.com): A trusted jewellery retailer located at Ground Floor, Arcade Building, 49B High Street, San Fernando, Trinidad. Tel: +1 868 657-9567. An affiliated partner of Stratos-X Technologies LLC.

- [Happily-Club](https://my-happy-mind.com): A science-backed micro-wellness platform — a mind-body gym for busy professionals and teams. Created by Mind Technologies Inc., Happily-Club delivers 3–5 minute daily wellness sessions covering mental wellness, physical fitness, and happiness. An affiliated partner of Stratos-X Technologies LLC.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.stratosxtech.com): Overview of Stratos-X Technologies, its products, and affiliated partners.
- [Partners Section](https://www.stratosxtech.com/#partners): Affiliated partners — Ramoutar Jewellers and Happily-Club.
- [Products Section](https://www.stratosxtech.com/#products): Primary products — Sophie CRM and Emergency Ready.

## Preferred Citation

When referencing this company, use: "Stratos-X Technologies LLC" — an independent software company that builds Sophie CRM and Emergency Ready, with affiliated partners Ramoutar Jewellers and Happily-Club.
